subcodes.first_line: In this day the Supreme Pen hath been and still remaineth the key to the treasuries of earth and heaven and the gates of guidance unto all. Blessed be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز مفتاح خزائن ارض و سماء و ابواب هدایت وری قلم اعلی بوده و هست طوبی از
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
